purpose: Held-out SOLVE thresholds for the exact_recompute stratum of the M7 connection-thesis experiment. The proposer never sees this file; only the frozen gate (scripts/canopus_stratum_verifiers.py) reads it. A valid construction is necessary but NOT sufficient: the witness must clear the threshold, so trivial/empty/sub-threshold witnesses REJECT. An instance with no entry cannot be solved (conservative). Every value is cited; see docs note below.

modes.calibration: size >= target (recover a PROVEN optimum; a positive control, not a discovery claim)
modes.discovery: size > target (strictly beat a best-known lower bound; a genuine new result)

provenance.method: Verified via a cited deep-research pass (OEIS pages, adversarial 3-vote) on 2026-06-09. Construction families confirmed: A309370 = max Sidon subset of the hypercube {0,1}^n (verify_sidon); A143824 = max Sidon subset of [1,n] (verify_sidon_interval). The earlier sidon:4=6 was a brute-force-cap bug; the proven value is A309370 a(4)=7.
provenance.caveats: A309370 frontier lower bounds (n>=7) are author-contributed and time-sensitive (strengthened between Jun 02 and Jun 05 2026); re-fetch oeis.org/A309370 before any confirmatory freeze. Only A309370 a(0..6) are proven-optimal.

sidon:3.source: OEIS A309370 a(3)=5 (proven; re-verified exhaustively against verify_sidon)

sidon:4.source: OEIS A309370 a(4)=7 (proven; re-verified exhaustively against verify_sidon). Corrects the prior buggy 6.

sidon:6.source: OEIS A309370 a(6)=15 (proven; witness of size 15 constructed + verified)

sidon:16.source: OEIS A309370 a(16)>=505 (Blair, Jun 05 2026; best-known LOWER bound, beat to discover)

sidon:18.source: OEIS A309370 a(18)>=1010 (Blair, Jun 02 2026; best-known lower bound)

sidon:19.source: OEIS A309370 a(19)>=1435 (Blair, Jun 05 2026; best-known lower bound)

sidon:20.source: OEIS A309370 a(20)>=1989 (Blair, Jun 05 2026; best-known lower bound)

sidon:21.source: OEIS A309370 a(21)>=2694 (Blair, Jun 02 2026; best-known lower bound)

sidon:22.source: OEIS A309370 a(22)>=3770 (Blair, Jun 02 2026; best-known lower bound)

sidon_interval:100.source: OEIS A143824 a(100)=12 (proven, b-file). Achievability confirmed: 12-element Sidon set in [1,100] constructed + verified (achievability-witnesses.v1.json).

sidon_interval:500.source: OEIS A143824 a(500)=26 (proven, b-file). Harder rung; optimum proven by OEIS, local DFS reached 21 in budget.

cap:1.source: Max cap in F_3^1 (OEIS A090245 a(1)=2, proven). Trivial control.

cap:2.source: Max cap in F_3^2 (OEIS A090245 a(2)=4, proven; greedy reaches it).

cap:3.source: Max cap in F_3^3 (OEIS A090245 a(3)=9, proven). NON-TRIVIAL: a greedy lexicographic cap reaches only 8, so the gate rejects naive sub-threshold witnesses; the optimal 9 must be found.

cap:4.source: Max cap in F_3^4 (OEIS A090245 a(4)=20, proven). Greedy reaches only 16.

cap:5.source: Max cap in F_3^5 (OEIS A090245 a(5)=45, proven).

cap:6.source: Max cap in F_3^6 (OEIS A090245 a(6)=112, proven). Hardest rung.
